title: Maharanga alba
uses: Maharanga alba is used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments. The plant is believed to possess anti-inflammatory properties, which may help alleviate symptoms of fever and pain. Maharanga alba is also used to treat digestive issues, such as diarrhea and nausea. Additionally, it is believed to have antimicrobial properties, which may help protect against infections. However, more research is needed to confirm the efficacy and safety of Maharanga alba for medicinal use.
parts: Maharanga alba is a plant species that has been used in traditional medicine for centuries. The medicinal parts of Maharanga alba include its roots and leaves, which are used to treat various health conditions. The roots of the plant are rich in antioxidants and have anti-inflammatory properties, making them useful for treating wounds and skin infections. The leaves, on the other hand, are used to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues. Additionally, the plant's roots and leaves are also used to treat digestive problems and improve overall health.
